description: Seasonal selling: Black Friday, Navidad, New Year, back-to-school, etc. 3-6x revenue spikes

items.name: Black Friday/Cyber Monday strategy
items.tactic: Preparar 3 meses antes. Email list prep. Inventory. Landing page. Ads budget. Día: 40-50% de annual revenue posible. Scarcity real.

items.name: Holiday gift campaigns (Navidad)
items.tactic: Reframe producto como regalo. Gift guides. Packaging premium. Free shipping threshold. 2x conversion Nov-Dec.

items.name: New Year resolution selling
items.tactic: Enero = fitness, productivity, learning. Message: "New year, new you". Growth 5x en enero.
